kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are two additional overrides: any house where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0 should be set to "EVU", and any house where HOUSE_NUM1 is in the range 500 to 599 should also be set to "EVU".

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09C" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE J09C_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09C_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR)
        FROM J09C_temp t2
        WHERE t2.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS
    ) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;

CREATE TABLE J09C_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        d.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.],
        d.HAUS,
        d.ANLAGE,
        d.ME_MA_ID,
        d.EQUNR,
        d.HOUSE_NUM1,
        d.ENTSCHEIDUNG
    FROM J09C_temp d
    LEFT JOIN eabl e ON d.EQUNR = e.EQUNR
),
joined_eablg AS (
    SELECT
        b.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.],
        ea.Installation AS ANLAGE_eablg,
        b.HAUS,
        b.ANLAGE,
        b.ME_MA_ID,
        b.EQUNR,
        b.HOUSE_NUM1,
        b.ENTSCHEIDUNG
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN eablg ea ON b.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] = ea.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.]
)
SELECT
    j.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.],
    j.HAUS,
    COALESCE(j.ANLAGE_eablg, j.ANLAGE) AS ANLAGE,
    j.ME_MA_ID,
    j.EQUNR,
    j.HOUSE_NUM1,
    j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    -- Prefer sales_master over net_master
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM joined_eablg j
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TABLE J09C_enriched AS
SELECT
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    d.HAUS,
    d.ANLAGE,
    d.ME_MA_ID,
    d.EQUNR,
    d.HOUSE_NUM1,
    d.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09C_temp d
LEFT JOIN eablg ON d.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON d.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON d.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sql_query:
SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09C_enriched;

args.email:
Dear EVU team,

Please find attached the meter reading file for tour J09C.

Best regards,
Meter Processing Bot

kwargs.content:
All processing steps for tour J09C are completed as requested:

- Created table `J09C_temp` from `decision_table` with `TOUR` like `J09C%` and added column `ENTSCHEIDUNG`.
- Classified each house by counting `EQUNR` per `HAUS`:
  - If `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.
  - If `HOUSE_NUM1` between 500 and 599 → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.
  - Else, if the house has fewer than 3 distinct `EQUNR` → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`.
  - Otherwise → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.

- Enriched the data:
  - Joined with `eablg` on `ANLAGE = Installation` to bring in `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`.
  - Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`.
  - For each record, if sales data exists, all contact fields (`TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`) are taken from `sales_master`; only when there is no sales entry are they taken from `net_master`.

- Exported the final dataset to CSV as `J09C.csv` with exactly these columns and order:
  - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
  - `HAUS`
  - `ANLAGE`
  - `ME_MA_ID`
  - `EQUNR`
  - `HOUSE_NUM1`
  - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
  - `TITLE`
  - `FORENAME`
  - `SURNAME`
  - `STREET`
  - `STREETNO`
  - `POST_CODE1`
  - `CITY1`
  - `CITY2`
  - `EMAIL`

- Sent the CSV file `J09C.csv` to the EVU team at `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped (`DELETEd`) the temporary working table `J09C_temp` after export and email.
